violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
Single use utensils were observed stored in a manner that did not protect the lip-contact surfaces from contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

Tongs were stored on an unclean surface (cabinet handle) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The hand sinks, located in the kitchen, were observed to have drain pipes draining directly into them. Hand sinks are designated for hand washing only. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
Single use items are being used for food preparation and storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The condensate from the refrigeration unit located in the basement is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
Observed the ceiling above the ware washing area to be chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Establishment is lacking a allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The hand sinks, located in the kitchen, were observed to have drain pipes draining directly into them. Hand sinks are designated for hand washing only. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

Drinks packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
Utensils were observed stored in a manner that did not protect the lip-contact surfaces from contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
Observed single service items stored on the floor in the basement. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
Single use items are being used for food preparation and storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The condensate from the refrigeration unit located in the basement is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
Observed the ceiling above the warewashing area to be chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
